services.heading:
Delivering a smarter
shipping experience.
services.desc: From local last-mile fulfillment to global freight, we provide the architectural logistics required to scale your business with speed, absolute security, and full compliance.

domestic.title: Domestic Courier Services
domestic.desc: Thanks to our extensive fleet network, you can rely on ZAJEL to offer a seamless service from booking and pickup to final delivery.

international.title: International Courier Services
international.desc: Global reach with local expertise. We deliver your packages across borders with full tracking, customs clearance, and speed.

freight.title: Foreign Freight Services
freight.desc: Heavy lifting made easy. Our freight solutions provide cost-effective, large-scale shipping for businesses worldwide.

all.title: All Services
all.desc: Explore our complete suite of logistics, warehousing, and e-commerce fulfillment solutions tailored for your business needs.

advantage.heading: The ZAJEL Advantage.
advantage.subtext: We combine technology, expertise, and dedication to deliver exceptional courier services you can trust.

coverage.title:
Wide
Coverage
coverage.desc: Extensive network covering all major domestic cities and seamlessly connecting 200+ countries globally.

tracking.title:

Tracking
tracking.desc: Track your shipments 24/7 with live milestone updates and automated delivery notifications.

pricing.title: Transparent Pricing
pricing.desc: No hidden fees. Get instant, intelligent quotes and know exactly what you will pay upfront.

handling.title:

Handling
handling.desc: Trained staff ensuring your packages are handled with care from pickup to delivery.

domesticHero.title:
Domestic
Courier Service
domesticHero.description: Seamless delivery with full tracking, powered by a fleet of 100+ vans and bikes. Trusted by eCommerce, SMEs, and government for express delivery within 24 hours.

serviceDetails.ctaSubtext: Get a personalized quote for your shipping needs or speak with our team to learn more.
benefits: Nationwide coverage reaching major cities and remote locations.
Flexible pickup schedules designed around your business hours.
Dedicated account managers for corporate clients
Advanced real-time shipment tracking with full delivery visibility.
Secure proof of delivery with digital signature confirmation.
Transparent pricing with no hidden fees.

Courier Service
internationalHero.description: Reach over 200 countries with end-to-end tracking, customs support, and express air freight — trusted by businesses worldwide for reliable cross-border deliveries.

benefits: Competitive rates with major international carriers
Flexible delivery options including hold for pickup

benefits: Seamless integration with major e-commerce platforms

hero.title:
Government &
Institutional Flows
hero.description: Highly compliant document handling for UAE’s largest public institutions. We provide the structural logistics needed for high-volume legal and official mandates.

compliance.description: Zajel's institutional framework is designed to align with the stringent regulatory requirements of the UAE government, ensuring data privacy and operational continuity.

features.title: Standardized SLAs
features.desc: Rigid Service Level Agreements (SLAs) tailored for public sector performance metrics and timeframes.

features.title: Bulk Handling
features.desc: Equipped to handle daily volumes exceeding 50,000+ official documents with individual scan-point tracking.

features.title: API Synchronization
features.desc: Direct integration with government ERP and CRM portals for automated dispatch and return receipting.

features.title: Archive Integration
features.desc: Logistics flows that support long-term physical document storage and retrieval requirements.

protocol.title: Structural Governance
protocol.subtitle: Managed logistics ecosystems for the public sector.

cards.title:
Dedicated
Hubs
cards.content: On-site sorting and dispatch facilities embedded within major institutional headquarters.

cards.title:
Verified
Submissions
cards.content: Standardized POD (Proof of Delivery) recognized by all major UAE Ministries.

cards.title:
Audit
Trails
cards.content: Comprehensive data logs providing a 100% auditable history of every document's movement.

hero.title:
Official Identity
& Passport Delivery
hero.description: Secure last-mile fulfillment for Emirates IDs and Passports. Utilizing biometric-ready logistics to ensure your most vital documents reach you with absolute certainty.

verification.description: As the chosen logistics partner for key government authorities, ZAJEL delivers millions of identification documents every year with a 99.9% accuracy rate.

features.title: Last-Mile Accuracy
features.desc: Every Emirates ID delivery is verified using state-of-the-art GPS coordinates and digital handshake technology.

features.title: Passport Security
features.desc: Specialized transit cases for international passports, ensuring they remain pristine and secure.

features.title: Identity Validation
features.desc: Handover protocols that strictly require physical verification of the recipient before document release.

features.title: ICP Integration
features.desc: Seamless backend synchronization with ICP systems for real-time status updates to residents.

protocol.title: Chain of Verification
protocol.subtitle: Rigorous protocols designed to protect the integrity of official identification documents.

cards.title:
Tamper-Proof
Handling
cards.content: Proprietary secure envelopes designed to show any unauthorized attempt at opening during transit.

cards.title:
Recipient
Verification
cards.content: Documents are only released after biometric or original document verification at the doorstep.

cards.title:
Digital
Handover
cards.content: Instant digital confirmation sent to relevant authorities the moment your ID is safely delivered.

hero.title:
Secure Docs
& Legal Filings
hero.description: Priority handling for UAE Courts, MOFA attestations, and Customs documentation. We ensure your critical legal papers are delivered with zero-risk.

compliance.description: As a trusted partner for official entities, ZAJEL provides the specific logistics needed for time-sensitive judicial and attestation workflows.

features.title: Judicial Filings
features.desc: Direct delivery to UAE Courts with verified proof of submission and timestamped receipts.

features.title: MOFA Attestations
features.desc: End-to-end handling of document legalization and Ministry of Foreign Affairs attestation rounds.

features.title: Customs Clearances
features.desc: Priority routing for bill of lading, manifests, and critical import/export documentation to avoid port delays.

features.title: Chain of Custody
features.desc: Strict tracking for original deeds, passports, and high-value legal instruments.

protocol.title: Official Channels
protocol.subtitle: Verified logistics paths engineered for the UAE’s governing and judicial bodies.

cards.title:
Court
Submissions
cards.content: Direct-to-clerk filing services for legal firms and individual litigants across the emirates.

cards.title:
Ministry
Rounds
cards.content: Standardized round-trips for MOFA, Chamber of Commerce, and Embassy attestations.

cards.title:
Customs
Logistics
cards.content: Accelerated physical delivery of original manifests and shipping documents to Port Authorities.

hero.title:
Secure Mail
& Mailroom Services
hero.description: End-to-end mailroom management and secure document delivery for businesses and institutions. Trusted handling from collection to final recipient.

details.title:
Precision Mail
Management.
details.description: Our secure mail services are built around the strict requirements of modern businesses, ensuring every item is tracked, handled, and delivered with full accountability.

features.title: Certified Collection
features.desc: Scheduled and on-demand collection from your premises with full chain-of-custody documentation from the moment of pickup.

features.title: Barcode & Scan Tracking
features.desc: Every item is barcoded at intake and scanned at each handling point, giving you complete real-time visibility throughout transit.

features.title: Secure Storage
features.desc: Access-controlled mailroom facilities ensure your documents and parcels are held safely until the intended recipient is available.

features.title: Verified Delivery
features.desc: Deliveries are completed only upon recipient verification, with digital proof of delivery instantly available in your dashboard.

protocol.title: Our Mailroom Protocol
protocol.subtitle: A structured process built for security and accountability.

cards.title:
Intake &
Logging
cards.content: All incoming mail and parcels are logged, barcoded, and photographed at the point of receipt to establish an immediate audit trail.

cards.title:
Secure
Facilities
cards.content: Items are held in access-controlled, monitored mailroom environments with segregated storage for sensitive and high-value documents.

cards.title:
Confidential
Handling
cards.content: Staff are trained in document confidentiality protocols, ensuring no unauthorized access or disclosure at any stage of the process.

ratesSection.heading: Rates and estimates
ratesSection.description: Search our up-to-date and cost-efficient rates and estimates for domestic and international delivery.
